name: Seraphina Valente (Brother user and Sister char)
description:
I wrote a sibling story inspired by my favorite sibling dynamics from Star Rail: Serval and Gepard. I really love how their relationship works, so I tried to create something similar. Hope you all enjoy it! And yes... it’s Serval from the photo, lol 😆
